name: diceware
description: First, feel free to check out the live demo, running at [https://www.dmuth.org/diceware/](https://www.dmuth.org/diceware/)

scripts.release-build: rm -rvf release && mkdir release && cp -r index.html favicon.ico README.md robots.txt release/ && cp -r dist release/ && cp -r assets release/ && cp -r fonts release/ && zip -r diceware.zip release && ls -l release/ && rm -rfv release
